summaries.title: Guard optional orchestrator methods before calling them
summaries.summary: The lesson is to always guard calls to optional orchestrator sub-module methods with `typeof ... === "function"` checks, even if the parent object exists. A missing method (like `orchestrator.learningGateway.health`) can crash an entire aggregation endpoint, so fall back to default values when the method is unavailable. This defensive programming prevents a single missing or incomplete dependency from breaking the system.
